layout_spacing.grid_strategy: The 'Technical' Look: Exposed grid skeletons, border-collapse, sharp edges. No soft shadows. Use 1px solid borders to create visible structure. Use 'Tetris' grid (asymmetrical bento) for projects.

components.buttons: Magnetic interaction using framer-motion, square corners (rounded-none), high contrast (Acid Yellow bg, Black text), hover state: sharp 4px offset shadow (Neo-Brutalist) or invert colors.
components.cards: Flat background (#111111), 1px subtle white border, no rounded corners, no drop shadows. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), border turns to Acid Yellow (#E5FE40).
components.cursor: Custom cursor: large circle with mix-blend-mode difference, scales up when hovering clickable elements.
components.navigation: Sticky top, heavy glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10), JetBrains Mono font for links.
components.marquee: Skills section uses 'Kinetic Texture' — massive outline text running continuously in the background (react-fast-marquee).

sections_guidelines.hero: Cinematic. Giant H1 text overlapping the brutalist geometry background. Abstract brutalist 3D image as background with max overlay opacity bg-black/50. Include scroll prompt at bottom.
sections_guidelines.about: Raw text. 2-column grid. Left side: massive uppercase label 'ABOUT', right side: bio text. High typography focus.
sections_guidelines.experience: Timeline styled as a raw technical log/terminal. Use JetBrains Mono for dates and roles. Exposed monospace borders.
sections_guidelines.projects: Asymmetrical Grid. High contrast borders. Image covers use grayscale filter by default, turning to full color on hover.
sections_guidelines.contact: Functional, stripped back form. Shadcn inputs but customized to be rounded-none, border-b only (like a terminal) or stark rectangular boxes.

hero_background.description: Abstract brutalist 3D geometry with acid yellow accents. Use as full-screen hero background with parallax and dark overlay.

skills_texture.description: Glitch art data texture. Use in the skills section or as an abstract background for the contact form.

project_placeholder_1.description: Black and white brutalist building. Use as placeholder cover for Mercanis or Dechea project.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Brutalist aesthetic: sharp edges (rounded-none), exposed grids, mono fonts for tech details, and high-contrast colors.
DO NOT USE Inter for headings. Use Chivo for headings, JetBrains Mono for accents, and IBM Plex Sans for body.
Implement a custom cursor that interacts with links/buttons (mix-blend-mode: difference).
Use Framer Motion for scroll-driven reveals (e.g., text splitting, elements sliding up, magnetic buttons).
Hero section MUST have parallax effect and overlay on the background image so text is readable.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='download-cv-button').
For icons, install and use @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react. Prefer raw technical lines over soft rounded icons.
